extract.script: () => { const pickText = (node) => (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const nodes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button[id], .accordion-button, .shiny-input-container, .form-group, table tr, .dataTables_wrapper tr')); return nodes.map((node, idx) => ({ citation_id: `ipubmed-${idx + 1}`, title: pickText(node), access_mode: 'authorized-browser', source_provider: 'ipubmed', notes: [node.id ? `id=${node.id}` : '', node.className ? `class=${String(node.className)}` : '', 'browser-captured structured block from live IPubMed page'].filter(Boolean).join('; ') })).filter(row => row.title && row.title.length > 6).slice(0, 30); }
